Describe the visual sequence of the bicycle parts introduction and lighting changes.
canonical_answer: At 0s, lighting transitions from dark to fully illuminated revealing bike parts; at 2s, large white outlined text reading 'BIKE ASSEMBLY' overlays the black frame; at 4s, the rear wheel is visible attached to the frame while the front wheel remains detached on the floor.

question: Describe the visual sequence of the tool layout and specification overlays.
canonical_answer: At 10s, various tools including a black open-ended wrench and chrome ratchet are arranged on the surface; at 12s, white text identifies the socket wrench with extension; at 14s, specific millimeter sizes for sockets and Allen wrenches appear in the overlay.
